name: Trailing Alocasia Plant - Threshold™
description:
Transform any corner of your home into a vibrant, green space with this Artificial Trailing Alocasia Plant from Threshold™. Housed inside a ceramic pot for easy display, this artificial potted plant features a realistic looking alocasia plant to bring a lovely, natural look to your decor. Best of all, the artificial construction means it stays beautiful without the hassle of watering or pruning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
